text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days before the Aoba Sho, I find Mejiro
Ardan studying race footage of Sakura Chiyono
O and Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As it's so unusual for her to focus on other runners
in the lead-up to a goal race, I come to realize
that those two might mean a lot to her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan, however, reasserts that her goal
has always been to outshine her older sister and
devotes her full attention to the Aoba Sho once
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Aoba Sho, a calm and
composed Mejiro Ardan prepares to race without
a hint of complacency.
